description: Amazing tool, very fast, and collects all the activities from similar tools on the market in one chrome extension. Easy to use within the browser, easy to export to other file formats.
author: Daria J.
pros: It worked wonders,very easy interface ,useful tool to write any essays, letters, newsletters and sales emails.Grammar improvement,
cons: It is only for Chrome, not for other browsers which is sad. The pricing is pretty expensive comparing to other apps.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Effortless AI writing for Email and Docs
description: Overall, it is a reliable tool for drafting professional emails and responses quickly. This enhances users productivity exponentially.
author: Nishant T.
pros: - AI writer assistant for grammar correction, and email writing - Work smoothly with Gmail and browser text editors - Offers robust functionality around well structured, fluent content with contextual understanding - Robust capability around drafting email and quick summaries - Customisation of tone and length of content
cons: - Privacy is a concern - Lacks memory context beyond prompts - Sometimes it gives inconsistent tone as output

review_title: Interesting to dabble in, but don't bet your life on it.
description: Not bad; still fun to dabble into see what the AI engine is thinking.
author: Joseph Z.
pros: It quickly responds with reasonable answers to your questions in a general way.
cons: It quickly responds with reasonable answers to your questions in a general way.

review_title: So far, the best AI Content Writer
author: Miguel G.
pros: ChatGPT is so far, the best AI tool for content writing. The content is more accurate than other AI tools and the quality of it is impressive.
cons: The only thing is the info is not up-to-date.

author: Jeff M.
pros: One of the standout features is its versatility. Whether you're seeking information, brainstorming ideas, or just engaging in casual conversation, ChatGPT seamlessly adapts to the context. It feels like conversing with a knowledgeable and articulate companion. The responsiveness of ChatGPT is also noteworthy. The speed at which it generates coherent and contextually relevant responses is impressive, making interactions feel dynamic and fluid. I appreciate the effort that has gone into refining the model for a wide range of topics. It demonstrates a commendable understanding of diverse subject matters, providing valuable information and insights.
cons: Lack of Real-Time Information: As of the last update in January 2022, ChatGPT doesn't have real-time internet access. This means it might not provide the most current information on rapidly evolving topics. Tendency to Generate Incorrect or Implausible Answers: ChatGPT generates responses based on patterns it learned during training. In some cases, it may produce answers that sound plausible but are factually incorrect or nonsensical.

review_title: ChatGPT triggers ideas & cuts through the grunt work
description: The more I've looked at how others are using it, the more useful it's become for me as I've incorporated their understanding with my own.
author: Paul E.
pros: CHatGPT writer works best when you treat it as a brainstorming parter to bounce ideas off. Just like having a conversation as it throws out ideas, or content, you can dig deeper by questioning what it's suggested or written. It's great for doing the writing "grunt work" which you can then edit to make it unique and reflect your ideas.
cons: You have to recognise what it can and can't do well. The more you can train it, the better it will work for you. But it's not a panacea. It doesn't have your knowledge base or experience, so don't expect it to just do everything for you.

author: Valentina C.
pros: ChatGPT is user-friendly, it allows users to create quality texts of all types effortlessly. It is quick and accurate when talking about topics that are not too specific.
cons: The aspect I find less satisfying about it is that it often struggles to provide accurate answers for questions that are specific.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This is a game changer! ChatGPT Writer can be easily integrated in a browser (Chromium-based only), works on all sites, and helps to write all kind of texts. I used it mosty for emails and very much happy about it.
cons: The limitation of integration in all browsers.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's nice to have a tool to help with mundane emails and even newsletters. It ups my game on content quality when I email others. No more simple replies. I can go in-depth now!
author: Lori R.
pros: It's nice to have the added helper when I need to compose emails and messages to clients. This feature is easy to access with the click of a button. Now I don't stress over how to say it and allow the AI to compose it for me.
cons: Nothing. It's a great tool for communications.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Fast easy and convenient. It works like me only better and faster
author: Jaime S.
pros: It was quick to use and understand after downloading it. I could start using it right away and it gave me exactly what I was looking for.
cons: It cannot read your mind...darn it! Otherwise it worked great.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Francesco S.
pros: Facile da usare e produzione di testo di alta qualità.
cons: In alcuni momenti della giornata è un pò lento.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Würde ich jeden im Vertrieb weiterempfehlen
author: Cem K.
pros: Ist aktuell ja nicht mehr wegzudenken, KI ist die Zukunft und hat unendliche Anwendungsmöglichkeiten. Einfach zu bedienen und super Ergebnisse
cons: Keine Nachteile, eventuell etwas günstigere Full Versions
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: William M.
pros: Chatgpt est un incontournable pour optimiser la rédaction de textes quelqu'ils soient
cons: Le paramétrage est un élément essentiel, et si on est peu à l'aise avec l'informatique on est peu guidé
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best AI writing tool I tried
author: Alessia D.
pros: It's easy, it integrates with everything, it's fast and it does its job.
cons: This could be said for any AI writing tool, I guess, but sometimes the texts are easily recognizable as written by AI. So I always read them and I make sure to add something personal/give them a "human touch" if I feel it is needed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Positive overall experience. Used ChatGPT to negotiate a refund based on verbiage the app supplied.
author: Antwoine C.
pros: Simplicity of resolving commands given. Any subject ChatGPT has a respectable response
cons: Responses tend to be generic at times. I’m a fan of where technology is headed but think the algorithm could use some tweaks.
